prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年第 67 名→2026 年第 73 名，近年排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强理工类高校；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉评价文件中未出现明显负面或正面舆情事件，抖音热度排名未进入前 106 名，整体关注度一般，未见报考心理异常信号；石油与天然气工程（A+）、地质资源与地质工程（A-）、化学工程与技术（A-）等为该校王牌学科，与招生专业中的石油工程、油气储运工程、化工与制药类等高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，该校上述专业均有招生，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年（约 17.2 万）略有减少，但物理类考生估算仍约 11.4 万，考生规模基本稳定；省控线 2024–2025 年物理类本科批均为 360 分，特殊类型招生控制线 480→472 分略有下降，卷面难度无明显变化；该校位于山东青岛，对黑龙江考生属跨省报考；从地域招生汇总看，该校在黑龙江招生占比约 2% 左右，属正常水平，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年小幅缩招、考生规模基本稳定及计算机/电气等热门专业持续高热等因素，在 2025 年基准 10983 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 10832 名，区间 10332–11332 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 10716→10913→9109→18272→10983; in 2023, there was a clear forward shift, but in 2024, due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection, there was a significant backward shift to 18272; in 2025, it rebounded to 10983, with large fluctuations in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 10983th place; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 112 in 2021, 113 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 109 in 2024, 109 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 106, a slight reduction of about 2.75% compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking: 67th in 2021 → 73rd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 science and engineering universities nationwide; in the 2021–2026 reputation evaluation documents, there were no obvious negative or positive public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, overall attention is average, no abnormal signals in application psychology; petroleum and natural gas engineering (A+), geological resources and geological engineering (A-), chemical engineering and technology (A-) are the university's flagship disciplines, highly related to enrollment majors such as petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, chemical and pharmaceutical categories, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, etc., have been continuously hot and recommended in 2024–2026; the university offers these majors, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 167,000, slightly decreasing from about 172,000 in 2025, but the estimated number of physics category candidates is still about 114,000, with a basically stable candidate scale; provincial control line: 2024–2025 physics category undergraduate batch both 360 points, special type enrollment control line 480→472 points, slightly decreased, with no significant change in exam difficulty; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, which is an inter-provincial application for Heilongjiang candidates; from the regional enrollment summary, the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2%, which is normal, with no obvious regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, slight enrollment reduction in 2026, basically stable candidate scale, and sustained high popularity of computer/electrical and other hot majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 10983th place; predicted minimum ranking approximately 10832th, range 10332–11332th.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1830→1729→1546→2430→1933, moving forward year by year from 2021 to 2023, shifting back to 2430 in 2024 due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject selection, and rebounding to 1933 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1933rd place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 people in 2021, 4 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 people, a significant 50% expansion compared to 2025, which significantly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking was 67th in 2021→73rd in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 national science and engineering universities, with a small liberal arts enrollment scale; the university did not have significant negative or positive public opinion events in reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, and its Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, with overall attention being average; petroleum and natural gas engineering (A+), geological resources and geological engineering (A-) are its flagship disciplines, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (economics, accounting, Russian, law) are weakly related to these disciplines, and the pulling effect of advantageous disciplines on liberal arts applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics/finance/finance categories are divided and wait-and-see, accounting/finance/auditing categories are recommended, law is recommended but competitive, Russian is a foreign language category generally wait-and-see; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 167,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 53,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (about 55,000), with a small decline in candidate scale; the provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch from 2024 to 2025 dropped from 410 to 405 points, and the special type enrollment control line also dropped from 486 to 480 points; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, which is an inter-provincial application for Heilongjiang candidates; from the regional enrollment summary, the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2%, which is normal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the significant 50% expansion in 2026, the slight decrease in history category candidates, and the differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1933rd place, competition is expected to significantly ease; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2493rd place, with a range of 2044–2942.
